examples: She wrote out a certificate of attendance.
He wrote out a receipt for the payment.
He wrote out a check for the full amount.
The manager wrote out a warning letter.
She wrote out all the instructions.
They wrote out the contract by hand.
Please write out the recipe for me.
The doctor wrote out a prescription.
example_translate: Он выписал чек на полную сумму.
write out.synonyms:
Выписывать, записывать полностью - write down, transcribe, copy out
Выписывать (рецепт, документ) - prescribe, issue
